name: Ramkhamhaeng Hospital Public Company Limited
summary: Ramkhamhaeng Hospital Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates a private hospital that provides medical services in Thailand. The company operates through two segments, Hospital and Others. Its hospital includes 3 patient buildings with approximately 485 beds. The company also sells medical equipment and instruments. Ramkhamhaeng Hospital Public Company Limited was founded in 1988 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
